import type { AllParams, RouteById } from './routeInfo' import type { AnyRouter } from './router' import type { Expand } from './utils' export type ResolveUseParams< TRouter extends AnyRouter, TFrom, TStrict extends boolean, > = TStrict extends false ? AllParams<TRouter['routeTree']> : Expand<RouteById<TRouter['routeTree'], TFrom>['types']['allParams']> export type UseParamsResult< TRouter extends AnyRouter, TFrom, TStrict extends boolean, TSelected, > = unknown extends TSelected ? ResolveUseParams<TRouter, TFrom, TStrict> : TSelected
